title: Figura SillyPlugin
body:
Spiritual successor of [GoofyPlugin](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura-goofyplugin).

Contains the more goofy features of GoofyPlugin, and more! 
Everything can be found using the `/figura docs` command and the `silly` lua global, but here's a summary:
- Hiding individual hud elements\*
- Get nameplate/color of other avatars\*
- Bumpscocity permission\*
- GoofyPlugin's beloved `:setPos()/:setVelocity()/:setRot()/:setCanFly()` functions\*\*
- Error event for your avatar (lets you cancel the error!)\*
- Turning off collision locally\*\*
- Set blocks locally\*\*

Everything is properly handled upon any form of your avatar unloading!

###### \*Exists in GoofyPlugin
###### \*\*Requires op level 2, creative mode, singleplayer, or the string `§s§i§l§l§y§p§l§u§g§i§n` in the MOTD


This project is made using Modstitch and Stonecutter, so porting to newer/older versions *should* be simple, so if you want me to port to a version that figura exists on, then feel free to message me on discord (`@niko.oneshot.real`)! The only exception is forge versions where there is no NeoForge version available.

Presently available versions:
- 1.21.4
  - Fabric
  - NeoForge
- 1.21.1
  - Fabric
  - NeoForge
- 1.20.1
  - Fabric
